title: Row actions: add Print (and row action) when status selected
description: Add Print row action when status selected; clarify row vs bulk action. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 22).

title: Track: rename Steps button to Create steps / Manage steps when steps exist
description: Steps button label: 'Create steps' or 'Manage steps' when steps exist. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 21).

title: Time option mm:ss (e.g. no-show timer)
description: Support mm:ss time option for no-show timer; backend keep seconds, extend max if needed. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 20).

title: Program settings: Strict priority first; ratio labels; info text; station selection details
description: Rename 'Priority first' to 'Strict priority first'; ratio labels; info text; station selection 'more details'. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 15).

title: Admin settings: show warning when require supervisor override on but no supervisors
description: When 'require supervisor override' is on, show warning in staff/station area when no supervisors assigned. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 14).

title: Reorder Program Show nav: Overview → Processes → Stations → Staff → Track → Settings
description: Reorder Program Show nav tabs to: Overview, Processes, Stations, Staff, Track, Settings. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 13).

title: Profile: better file-upload UI (replace/improve input type file)
description: Improve avatar file-upload UI; replace or improve input type file. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 8).

title: Profile: nav area stable; profile not horizontal-only
description: Profile page: nav area stable; profile layout not horizontal-only. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 7).

title: Admin live program: Open Triage → View Program; first page stations
description: Admin live program: rename Open Triage to View Program, first page = stations. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 6).

title: Staff profile dropdown: hide Station, Triage, Track Overrides
description: Hide redundant nav items (Station, Triage, Track Overrides) from staff profile dropdown; they are already in nav. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 3).
